protein_name: Intercellular signal essential for a variety of patterning events during development. Binds to the patched (PTC) receptor, which functions in association with smoothened (SMO), to activate the transcription of target genes. Implicated in endochondral ossification: may regulate the balance between growth and ossification of the developing bones. Induces the expression of parathyroid hormone-related protein (PTHRP). Belongs to the hedgehog family. Expressed in embryonic lung, and in adult kidney and liver. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
